chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.1118 of 2024 Date Order with Signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at A 2. For orders on MA No.1508 of 2024 3. For hearing of case 01.09.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh along with SIP – Nadeem Baig of Police Station Kharadar, Karachi Mr. Khadim Ali Kaka, Advocate for Respondent along with M/s. Muhammad Abdul Rahim Tahir, Abdul Rashid and Babar Zia, Representatives of Bank Al- Falah Limited are present ------------------------------- The Counsel for Bank Al-Falah Limited has entered appearance and submitted his Vakalatnama along with copy of statement, which is taken on record and copy supplied to Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Report submitted on behalf of Official Respondent is also taken on record. In view of information filed today by Bank Al-Falah Limited, the purpose of this Criminal Misc. Application appears to have been served and the same is disposed of in the above terms. The representatives of Bank Al-Falah Limited undertake to facilitate/ assist the Investigating Officer within the context and contours of the information submitted in Court today and right of privacy and confidentiality under the Banking Companies Ordinance, 1962. J U D G E Qurban
